name: Bush's Creamy Peanut Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks until creamy.
2. Boil the milk in a double boiler.
3. Mix together the yolks, sugar, cornstarch, peanut butter, and salt.
4. Gradually add this mixture to the boiling milk while stirring constantly.
5. Cook in the double boiler until thickened.
6. Pour into the prepared pie shell and refrigerate until chilled.
